title: 5 things a man of God builds before 25
caption:
5 things a man of God builds before 25. Not the ones anyone's watching.

1. His word — small commitments, kept. That's where character starts.
2. Silence with God — 15 minutes, no phone, just the Word. Harder than any workout.
3. A governed body — not for Instagram, but because a man who can't govern his body can't govern anything else.
4. One real brother — not a podcast, not a server. A man with your number who knows your actual sin.
5. Money that serves him — spend less than you make, give first, build that discipline now.

You won't get credit for any of this for years. But you'll know you built something real.

Comment "build" and I'll send you the ETHOS link.

#ethos #christianmen #faithoverfear #godlymen #manofgod #disciplineequalsfreedom #masculinity #thework #christianity #scripture
theme: He works. / He runs his life — his impulses don't control him.
